chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1075 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.5866/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.5867/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 25.04.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Mst. Madiha Imran wife of Syed Imran Ali seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.576/2024, registered at P.S. Shahrah-e-Noor Jahan for offence under sections 302, 34, PPC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is not nominated in FIR, previously her mother was implicated in the FIR and IO found her innocent in the investigation and placed her name in Column No.2 of challan and now the IO is calling the applicant for her statement but she apprehends her arrest at the hands of IO in order to humiliate and disgrace her, hence she needs some protection to enable her to appear before the Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of five days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
